creator: josh.carroll@gmail.com
text:
The 0.10 release of wdiag does not support the recent changes in -HEAD to igmp.h, removing a legacy macro (IGMP_V2_MEMBERSHIP_REPORT).

I have released a new upstream version (0.10.1) which addresses this by using an #if to use IGMP_v2_MEMBERSHIP_REPORT instead of IGMP_V2_MEMBERSHIP_REPORT to support 8.0 and newer releases.

Attached is a shar of the updated 0.10.1 wdiag port directory with the updated Makefile and distinfo.

Thanks,
Josh

Fix: .shar attached of new release of port.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Try to build on CURRENT as of 6/10 or newer (SVN r193938).
